name: New Zealand Coastal Seafoods Limited
summary: New Zealand Coastal Seafoods Limited produces nutraceuticals, seafood products, and marine ingredients in New Zealand, Australia, and Asia. It offers ready to eat products, such as cooked ling maw, cooked paua, and powdered collagen ling maw nutraceutical products under the NZCS brand. The company also offers products its online. New Zealand Coastal Seafoods Limited was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Nedlands, Australia.
